description: Redesign the About section tabs: make them horizontal (not vertical on desktop) with horizontal swipe capability (left/right). Change the 'Approach' tab to become 'Soft Skill & Hard Skill' with appropriate content replacing the current approach cards.
steps: In src/sections/About.tsx: Change the tab layout from the current lg:col-span-3 vertical sidebar to a horizontal tab bar that spans the full width above the content. Make tabs swipeable on mobile using framer-motion drag gestures (dragX) or touch swipe detection to switch between tabs.
Change the tab type from 'story' | 'experience' | 'approach' to 'story' | 'experience' | 'skills'. Rename the third tab from 'Approach' (Pendekatan) to 'Soft Skill & Hard Skill'.

Replace the approach tab content: Instead of the 3 numbered approach items, create two sub-sections: (a) Soft Skills - a list/grid of soft skills like Communication, Teamwork, Adaptability, Problem Solving, Time Management, Leadership; (b) Hard Skills - a list/grid of hard skills like React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Git, Figma, Node.js. Display them as interactive pills or cards with hover effects.

Implement horizontal swipe: Use framer-motion's drag='x' on the tab content container with dragConstraints, or detect swipe gestures to automatically switch to next/previous tab. Add visual indicators (dots or a progress bar) showing which tab is active.

Update locale files (en.json, id.json, zh.json): Change 'sections.about.tabs.approach' to 'Soft Skill & Hard Skill' (and translations). Add new locale keys for soft skills and hard skills items under 'sections.about.skills.soft' and 'sections.about.skills.hard'.
Update the grid layout: Remove the lg:grid-cols-12 split (3+9). Make it full width with tabs on top, content below.
acceptance_criteria: Tabs are displayed horizontally above content (not as a vertical sidebar)
Users can swipe left/right on mobile to switch between tabs
The third tab is labeled 'Soft Skill & Hard Skill' instead of 'Approach'
The skills tab shows categorized soft skills and hard skills
Tab transitions are smooth with animations
Build passes with npm run build
